title: north dakota (fargo) yankees
description: Embark on dungeon adventures with friends while having shared inventory and health. Whether it be working together to conquer dungeon or trolling your friends, there always is fun to be found.
body:
Welcome to a chaotic Minecraft experience. Play with friends and watch as chaos ensues when exploring dungeons and structures with shared health and inventory, along with other mods to add progression and spice to the each dimension. 

Are you ready to embark on the ultimate Minecraft adventure?
